mapper.insert: insert into movie (name, category_id, price, image, description, duration, director, actors, release_date, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{duration}, #{director}, #{actors}, #{releaseDate}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update movie
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
duration = #{duration},
director = #{director},
actors = #{actors},
release_date = #{releaseDate},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
